title: Compliance — Conflict of Interest (Top-Level Hub Page)
content:
This is the top-level Conflict of Interest hub landing page in the ORA Research Compliance section. It contains a short orientation paragraph and two outbound links to the two COI program streams at Morgan State University.

Orientation text: Morgan State University promotes adherence to federal regulations and best practices in academia to uphold the highest standards of research ethics and public trust in its scholarly activities. To this end, the university's conflict of interest requirements ensure integrity and transparency in its research and commercialization activities. These policies and procedures are designed to identify and manage any potential conflicts that may arise when personal, financial, or other interests could compromise, or appear to compromise, the objectivity of research and the ethical conduct of researchers. Faculty, staff, and students involved in research must disclose any significant financial interests or external commitments that could influence their research outcomes.

Two outbound links from this hub:
1. Conflict of Interest in Sponsored Research → https://www.morgan.edu/office-of-research-administration/research-compliance/conflict-of-interest/conflict-of-interest-for-sponsored-research (Financial Conflict of Interest / FCOI in federally funded research; administered by the Office of Research Compliance).
2. Conflict of Interest in Commercialization, Technology Transfer, Patents, etc. → https://www.morgan.edu/technology-transfer-and-intellectual-property/conflict-of-interest (Conflict of Interest in Research and Development; administered by the Office of Technology Transfer; governed by the 2017 Board of Regents COI Policy and the Maryland Public Ethics Law).

Note on document organization: The canonical, deeply-populated COI overview in this knowledge base is `compliance_conflict_of_interest` (doc_id), which consolidates content from BOTH streams. This `compliance_coi_hub_x12058` page captures only the slim hub itself. The companion subpage for the sponsored-research stream is `compliance_coi_sponsored_research`. The commercialization stream lives on the Office of Technology Transfer site at /technology-transfer-and-intellectual-property/conflict-of-interest-in-randd and is summarized inside the canonical COI doc rather than as its own ORA compliance JSON.

Contact for general COI inquiries: Office of Research Administration, Tyler Hall, Student Service Bldg, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251. Phone 443-885-4044. Fax 443-885-8280. Email ask.ora@morgan.edu.
